strategy_snapshot.topology: AI Interconnect Tax + Custom ASIC (XPUs) + VMWare Subscription Engine
strategy_snapshot.primary_vector: Non-linear networking complexity growth in 100k+ GPU clusters + VCF margin accretion
strategy_snapshot.fragile_point: VMware customer churn due to aggressive pricing vs Hyperscaler logic internalisation
strategy_snapshot.core_thesis: Broadcom controls the critical connectivity and custom silicon path for AI. It is the only firm with multi-generational ASIC visibility through 2029.

deployment_plan.comment: Raised stop to $402 to lock in major gains.

stop_loss_rules.macro_kill_switch: Hyperscaler Capex guidance cut > 15% or major ASIC partner cancellation
